event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1994/1996 deep review) merged duplicate event f975aa95-dc26-5321-8b81-ac5f0431c281 ("Yankee Springs Rec. Area, Michigan Southern Michigan Orienteering Club"). Reason: same-weekend duplicate with club text written into title and venue. Notes: The duplicate row is the same Apr. 9-10, 1994 intercollegiate meet; the newsletter explicitly names Yankee Springs Recreation Area and Southern Michigan Orienteering Club.
